videos.title: GoodMode v2 — The Prompt That Supercharges ChatGPT
videos.description: Turn ChatGPT into a cross-disciplinary strategist with 100x the critical thinking. Paste once into your custom instructions and every chat from then on runs through the framework — sharper questions, structured reasoning, and real sources instead of vibes.
